title: Sending HTML email as notifications in Monday

posts.author: Timothy (Timothy Douglas)
posts.cookedHtml:
@upitchika , I am looking for the link or download for your HTML email notification application that you wrote.

Would you please send that link to tdouglas@rubytuesday.com?

Thank you.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Timothy!

I’d also recommend sending @upitchika a private message to make sure your request doesn’t get lost amongst notifications

posts.author: Timothy (Timothy Douglas)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, Bianca. I did send a message as well.
